rootCause: QuestForm only consulted the IndexedDB-backed quest list when validating titles. During initial load the list was empty while existing quests were still syncing, so duplicate titles matching built-in quests were accepted and the Playwright check for the "Title must be unique" message failed.
resolution: QuestForm now falls back to the server-provided existingQuests data when the IndexedDB list is empty, ensuring duplicate titles are rejected immediately. Added a regression unit test exercising the fallback and reran the e2e flow.
